text_block_list.name: Train Announcement
text_block_list.text:
We are approaching the last stop... Please ensure
you take all your personal belongings as you exit
the train.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Crap... I'm way past where I was supposed to get
off!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Even if I get off and start going back the other
way, I won't make it back to the academy by
curfew.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I could ask my manager... no, they'll be busy with that meeting right now. Sigh...

Gold City later gets scolded for returning after
curfew.
